card_description: The ignorant or malevolent creator god of the material world in Gnostic systems; builder of the Black Iron Prison.
full_description:
The ignorant or malevolent creator god of the material world in Gnostic systems; builder of the Black Iron Prison.

**Category:** Neoplatonism / Gnosticism

**Key segment contexts:**
- (circa 1975-1976) Dick explores the "Daimon of Socrates" (verified by Rollo May) as the source of his 1974 "Voice" and Attic Greek. He identifies this entity as "Eros" (Life/Joy) and concludes that he was "possessed...
- (circa 1975-1976) Dick identifies his 1974 merger with the "Daimon" as the "Second Birth" and the "Pearl of Great Price." He concludes that the Daimon (Eros/Will) is the source of his precognitive writing and that h...
- (circa 1975-1976) Dick identifies his experience as an "evolutionary advance" (Cosmic Consciousness) and the "next step up" for the human species. He reinterprets the "Fall" as a lack of perception and argues that t...

linked_segments.title: 1976-09-15_Dorothy_78.txt
